prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild workshop, Ren Ashbell (androgynous, short guild cloak, reinforced leather armor, bright scarf, scratched longsword) approaches the workbench of Ren Brightford (androgynous, rolled-sleeve apron, brass tool belt, ash-stained gloves). Ren Ashbell places the well-worn longsword on the wooden table, pointing to a deep notch on the blade while initiating a conversation about missing forge supplies. Cozy lighting, cinematic depth of field, high-quality anime art style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild workshop shot; Ren Brightford picks up the scratched longsword, rotating it under the warm workshop light to inspect the damage. Ren Brightford gestures toward an empty supply crate behind the bench, shaking their head while Ren Ashbell nods in collaborative understanding, continuing the discussion about the forge supplies. Consistent character appearance and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
